title: Witness Bundle
description: Independent timestamp or transparency witness for a Proof Pack. Ties pack_root_sha256 to an external time/existence authority.

pack_root_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the attested pack (== attestation_sha256, D12).

tsa_url.description: URL of the TSA server used (RFC 3161 only).

token_b64.description: Base64-encoded TSA response token (DER, RFC 3161) or Rekor entry.

query_b64.description: Base64-encoded RFC 3161 query used to request timestamp. Enables nonce-bound verification.

ca_cert_b64.description: Base64-encoded CA certificate chain for offline verification.

tsa_cert_b64.description: Base64-encoded TSA signing certificate for offline verification.

nonce.description: Nonce used in the TSA request for replay prevention.

gen_time.description: Timestamp from the TSA response (genTime field).

issued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the witness bundle was created.

verified_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the bundle was last verified. Null if not yet verified.
